case_title: RENEE HATFIELD VS. MANAL MAHMOUD et al

docket_entries.description: (SC-221) "RESPONSE" TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HATFIELD, RENEE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY HATFIELD, RENEE AS TO DEFENDANT MAHMOUD, MANAL MAHMOUD, YOSRI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HATFIELD, RENEE AS TO DEFENDANT MAHMOUD, MANAL MAHMOUD, YOSRI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 20.00 - SERVED APR-26-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAHMOUD, YOSRI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT (SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENT BY INSTALLMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAHMOUD, MANAL MAHMOUD, YOSRI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 20.00 - SERVED APR-26-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAHMOUD, MANAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HATFIELD, RENEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAHMOUD, MANAL MAHMOUD, YOSRI $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER (SC-222) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANTS IS "DENIED". THE PERSON WHO IS THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MUST PAY THE ENTIRE JUDGMENT IMMEDIATELY. - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2013 - JUDGMENT.
